channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Scott Pelley Alleges False Misconduct Accusation Preceded His Dismissal from CBS News
item.description: Veteran journalist Scott Pelley, who recently departed CBS News after nearly four decades with the network, described a series of contentious meetings that he says led to his termination. In comments ...

item.title: FG pushes faster completion of Abuja–Keffi highway project with strict quality standards
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria, through the Minister of Works, David Umahi, has restated its commitment to the early completion and high-quality delivery of ongoing road infrastructure projects alo...

item.title: Rising beef prices and supply shortages drive closures of Texas barbecue restaurants
item.description: Texas barbecue restaurants are facing significant financial pressure as beef prices reach historic highs and cattle supplies fall to a 75-year low, according to U.S. Department of Agriculture data cit...

item.title: Practical Productivity Tips for Developers Using Journals, Jira Smart Commits, and Docker
item.description: The article shares several personal productivity practices that the author has adopted to become a more organized and effective software developer. The first recommendation is maintaining a daily deve...

item.title: Connor McDavid ties Wayne Gretzky’s record with fifth Ted Lindsay Award victory
item.description: Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid has been awarded the Ted Lindsay Award for the fifth time in his NHL career, matching a record previously set by Wayne Gretzky. The award, which is voted on by m...

item.title: Lammy challenges JD Vance over remarks linking UK murder to migration
item.description: UK Deputy Prime Minister David Lammy has said he directly challenged US Vice-President JD Vance over comments he made about the killing of British teenager Henry Nowak. Vance had suggested the fatal s...

item.title: PCSO Reports No Winners for Superlotto 6/49 and Ultra Lotto 6/58 Draws on June 7, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that no bettor won the jackpot prizes in its major lotto draws conducted on June 7, 2026. According to the official results, no player matche...

item.title: Trump warns NBC interviewer of severe consequences in discussion about Iran nuclear threat and ongoing military conflict
item.description: In a televised interview on NBC’s “Meet the Press,” President Donald Trump made highly controversial remarks during a discussion with host Kristen Welker about ongoing U.S. military actions and foreig...

item.title: EU Committees Sustain Funding Freeze on Tanzania Amid Ongoing Political and Diplomatic Tensions
item.description: The European Parliament’s Committee on Foreign Affairs and Committee on Development have voted to maintain a freeze on approximately €156 million in funding intended for Tanzania in 2026, showing cont...

item.title: Lauren Boebert Rejects Affair Allegations and Confronts Fox News Reporter During Capitol Exchange

item.title: Court ruling on Marble Towers highlights Johannesburg’s broader building compliance challenges
item.description: The recent legal dispute over Marble Towers in Johannesburg’s CBD has highlighted far more than just a single building conflict. The case involved the owners of Marble Towers seeking an urgent interdi...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Potential Conflict of Interest in New Mexico Epstein Investigation
item.description: A newly launched investigation in New Mexico into Jeffrey Epstein’s Zorro Ranch is facing early criticism over potential conflicts of interest and credibility concerns. The New Mexico Legislature esta...

item.title: How personal style and clothing choices influence leadership perception and career success
item.description: This article explores how clothing and personal style can play a more strategic role in professional success than is often acknowledged, particularly for leaders. It highlights the idea that what prof...

item.title: DepEd outlines major education reforms for School Year 2026-2027, including a three-term calendar and improved teacher support

item.title: Opinion Column Criticizes Trump Administration Over Alleged Conflicts of Interest and Democratic Oversight Efforts
item.description: This opinion article by Jason Miciak argues that Democratic lawmakers should do more to publicly document and challenge what the author describes as corruption within the Trump administration. The pie...

item.title: Guide to Installing and Testing Beta Apps with Apple's TestFlight on Mac, iPhone, and iPad
item.description: OSXDaily explains how Apple users can access and test pre-release applications through TestFlight, Apple's official platform for beta software distribution. TestFlight allows developers to share upcom...

item.title: Indiana Fever and New York Liberty Meet in Commissioner’s Cup Matchup with Playoff-Level Expectations
item.description: The article previews a highly anticipated WNBA Commissioner’s Cup game between the Indiana Fever and the New York Liberty at Barclays Center in Brooklyn. Both teams entered the matchup with positive m...

item.title: Police Recover P2.8 Million Worth of Dried Cannabis from Abandoned Vehicle in La Trinidad, Benguet
item.description: La Trinidad police in Benguet province successfully recovered more than P2.8 million worth of dried cannabis from an abandoned Mitsubishi Pajero sport utility vehicle in Barangay Puguis early Sunday m...

item.title: Robert Reich Argues Trump’s Presidency Has Renewed Public Awareness of Democratic Institutions and Constitutional Safeguards
item.description: In this opinion article, former U.S. Labor Secretary Robert Reich argues that although he strongly opposes Donald Trump and his administration, the Trump era may ultimately serve as a wake-up call tha...

item.title: Republican Critics Condemn Ed Martin's Social Media Post Suggesting Political Opponents Seek Violence
